Northern Corn Leaf Blight.description: Fungal disease causing large, cigar-shaped lesions.
Northern Corn Leaf Blight.treatment: Apply fungicides containing strobilurins or triazoles.

Common Rust.description: Fungal infection thriving in cool, moist conditions.
Common Rust.treatment: Use rust-resistant hybrids and early fungicide application.

Powdery Mildew.description: Fungal illness that looks like white powder on leaves.
Powdery Mildew.treatment: Apply sulfur-based fungicides and improve air circulation.

Late Blight.description: Aggressive disease caused by Phytophthora infestans.
Late Blight.treatment: Remove infected plants immediately. Apply copper-based preventative sprays.
